cause_analysis.narrative: Luxe Wax & Spa churned on 2026-03-08 after 220 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2025-12-28 (app_chat) — first complaint keyword: "upset with". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2025-12-28 via app_chat. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.
